dose_original: ~3.5 g of 1% cream once daily (~35 mg luliconazole)
notes: Luliconazole Cream 1% topical, tinea pedis patients, Day 1 (first dose), Trial MP-1007. Cmax 0.40 ng/mL, AUC0-24 6.88 ng*h/mL. Topical formulation (~3.5g cream =35mg drug applied)

dose_original: approximately 4 g of Arazlo Lotion 0.045% once daily
notes: Tazarotene (parent) plasma Cmax (pg/mL) on Days 14-15 following 14 days once-daily topical application of Arazlo Lotion 0.045% (~4g, approx 1.8 mg tazarotene) in subjects >=12 years with moderate-to-severe acne; Cmax 4.84 pg/mL, AUC0-t 67.40 h*pg/mL; maximal use PK study V01-123A-501; units converted from pg/mL to ng/mL (/1000)
Cycle 1 Day 1 geometric mean Cmax in R/R AML patients (Study 2102-HEM-101)
Gabapentin PK after XP13512 (prodrug) administration; dose proportional
Total testosterone PK, Day 7 steady state, 30 mg 1% T dermal solution in hypogonadal men (Study MTE07, Treatment A). AUC(0-24)=7809 ng.hr/dL converted to ng.h/mL (÷100). Cmax 537 ng/dL = 5.37 ng/mL.
MMF PK (active metabolite of DMF). Study 109HV101, healthy volunteers, single dose, fasted. Cmax 2.15 mg/L, AUC0-inf 3.37 hr*mg/L, AUC0-t 3.35 hr*mg/L
Pediatric SC injection of 0.3 mg epinephrine; Cmax 1802 pg/mL = 1.802 ng/mL at 34 min (=0.567 h); t1/2 43 min = 0.717 h; published literature study (Simons et al.)

dose_original: 0.3 mg oxymetazoline HCl (0.6 mL Kovanaze, 3 unilateral 0.2 mL sprays)
notes: Intranasal administration, Study SR 2-06; oxymetazoline PK; Tmax median 5 min

dose_original: 1 drop lifitegrast 5% ophthalmic solution (35 mcL drop volume, 5.0% = 1.75 mg per drop)
notes: Phase 1 trial in 5 healthy subjects, 1 drop BID for 10 days, Day 10 plasma Cmax 1.70 +/- 1.36 ng/mL (range <=0.5-3.71), tmax 0.08-0.22 h. Prototype formulation, different from commercial. Day 10 Cmax ~3.5x higher than Day 1.
Therapeutic geometric Cmax at 80 mg fasted single dose, cross-study pooled analysis. Tmax ~2 h, half-life 40 h, CL 677 mL/min (40.6 L/h), Vd 32 L/kg from abs BA study.
Study B2101, healthy volunteers, fixed 750 mg dose of Fasinex; Cmax 1.7 uM converted to ng/mL using MW 359.65; t1/2 and CL from text (CL from PBPK model based on observed human PK data)
Study SAP101 Sufenta IV 30 mcg 1-min infusion; healthy subjects naltrexone block; mean +/- SD reported
ARRAY-162-111 single agent, AUC0-8h single dose

dose_original: ELX 200 mg qd (TRIKAFTA FDC with TEZ 100 mg qd/IVA 150 mg q12h)
notes: Elexacaftor (VX-445) in CF patients at approved regimen ELX 200 mg qd/TEZ 100 mg qd/IVA 150 mg q12h (FDC tablet, fed state required); population PK model mean Cmax,ss and AUCτ,ss; Tmax median 6 h (4-12); effective half-life 29.8 h; Vd/F 53.7 L; fixed-dose combo with tezacaftor and ivacaftor; units converted from μg/mL to ng/mL (x1000)
Steady-state GM Cmax and AUC0-tau in advanced RCC patients; Vz/F=138L (CV 28%); median Tmax 1-2h
120 mg QD recommended dose, steady state; values converted from nM using MW 535.60: Cmax,ss=3000 nM=1606.8 ng/mL, AUC0-24ss=33500 nM*h=17942.6 h*ng/mL; t1/2=45 h
Sepiapterin parent drug PK in adult PKU patients receiving 60 mg/kg QD with food (Phe-restricted); 24-hr AUC; dose estimated from mg/kg
